plugin-data.name: Plugin Comments
plugin-data.description: Adds a file-based comments system with moderation, CSRF protection, rate limiting, and ALTCHA anti-spam.

strings.admin_empty_state: No comments yet. Enable comments on a page to start.
strings.admin_pages_help: Enable or disable comments for each page. You can also do this directly from the page editor.
strings.admin_error_action: Error while processing action. Please try again.
strings.admin_save_hint: Click Save at the top of the page to save these settings.
strings.setting_rate_limit_help: IP cooldown after a comment. 0 = disabled.
strings.setting_comments_per_page_help: Number of comments displayed per page on the website.
strings.admin_action_clear_all: Clear all comments from this page
strings.admin_confirm_clear_all: Delete ALL comments from this page?
strings.front_no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first to comment.
strings.flash_altcha_invalid: Invalid anti-spam verification. Please try again.
strings.flash_csrf_error: Security error. Please reload the page and try again.
strings.flash_comments_disabled: Comments are not enabled on this page.
strings.flash_rate_limited: You are posting too often. Please wait {minutes} minute(s).
strings.flash_comment_pending: Thanks! Your comment will be published after moderation.
strings.flash_comment_published: Your comment has been published. Thank you!
